$comment: Alfred -> Cursor/Claude MCP source of truth. Template only: ${env:VAR} placeholders are resolved from Alfred's .env (or machine env) by Provision-Cursor.ps1. Path tokens (${repoRoot}, ${financeDir}, etc.) are resolved at provision time. Keys starting with _ are metadata used by the provisioner and are stripped before anything is written. NEVER put real tokens in this file.

powerbi-modeling-mcp._note: Edit live Power BI Desktop models. Auto-skipped if VS Code Power BI Modeling MCP extension is not installed.

excel._note: Read/write live OPEN Excel workbooks only. Do NOT use with excel-mcp (opposite access model). Auto-skipped if Alfred venv python or excellm is missing.

excel-mcp._note: ExcelMcp — CLOSED workbook / exclusive COM only. Complements live 'excel' (excellm). Never alternate mid-task. Auto-skipped if exe missing.

github._note: Official GitHub MCP (ghcr.io/github/github-mcp-server). Falls back to legacy npx package when Docker is not installed. Token from GITHUB_PERSONAL_ACCESS_TOKEN or GITHUB_TOKEN in Alfred .env.

playwright._note: Browser automation - navigate, fill forms, screenshot, reproduce UI bugs. No key needed.

context7._note: Library/SDK docs only — prefer over fetch/Tavily for API syntax. Do NOT use for repo code or general web search.

markitdown._note: Local file URI conversion (PDF, Office, images). Do NOT use for library docs (context7) or live search (Tavily).

fetch._note: Single known URL → markdown. Do NOT use for library docs (context7) or news/latest (Tavily).

filesystem._note: Finance OneDrive folder ONLY — repo code uses LeanCTX ctx_read. Never double-read the same file.

duckdb._note: SQL on CSV, Parquet, Excel exports, and local analytics DB. Replaces sqlite MCP.

fal-ai._note: AI image/video/audio generation via fal.ai models — ad creative, thumbnails, b-roll. Auto-skipped unless FAL_KEY is set in Alfred .env (get one at fal.ai/dashboard/keys).

magic._note: Magic UI components — generate animated React/Tailwind UI blocks (hero, marquee, bento, etc.). No key required. Frontend/landing-page work.

parallel-search._note: LLM-optimized web search + fetch (citation-backed excerpts in one call). Works key-free for anonymous use via the mcp-remote stdio bridge. Prefer over fetch for research after context7/docs. For higher rate limits set PARALLEL_API_KEY and add an Authorization header.

firecrawl._note: Firecrawl — web scraping, crawling, site mapping, structured extraction, and deep research (scrape/crawl/map/extract/search). Returns clean markdown/JSON from JS-heavy pages. Auto-skipped unless FIRECRAWL_API_KEY (fc-...) is set in Alfred .env. Get one at https://www.firecrawl.dev/app/api-keys

longhand._note: Lossless Claude Code session history — verbatim recall of tool calls, file edits, and thinking blocks from ~/.claude/projects/*.jsonl into local SQLite + ChromaDB before Claude rotates them. Install: pip install longhand && longhand setup. Auto-skipped if 'longhand' is not on PATH.

outlook-calendar._note: Read and manage local Microsoft Outlook calendar on Windows — list events in a date range, create/update meetings, find free time slots, check attendee status, access multiple calendars. Requires Outlook desktop client installed. Windows 11 24H2+ users must enable VBScript via Settings → Apps → Optional features → VBScript before this server will work. No API key needed.

ms-365._note: Microsoft 365 via Graph API — read SharePoint sites/files, OneDrive, Outlook mail, Calendar, Teams, and To-Do. Runs read-only by default (safe). First use runs MSAL device-code login (browser pop-up, once). Remove --read-only to enable write/send actions. Skill: sharepoint-graph.md. Auto-skipped if Node/npx is not on PATH.
